seo_title: Can AI Help Predict Heart Failure Patients' Progression?
meta_description: A deep-learning model predicts heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance, improving resource allocation and patient care.
body_html:
Yes, AI can help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year. Researchers developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.

Predicts changes in left ventricular systolic function from ECGs of patients with heart failure Developed and retrospectively tested across three different patient cohorts Accurately predicts prognosis up to a year in advance

Resource Allocation Patient Care Improvement

Improved resource allocation Enhanced patient care and outcomes

Limitations and Future Directions Further research is needed to validate the model’s performance in diverse patient populations and to explore potential biases.

source.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
source.summary: Researchers at MIT, Mass General Brigham, and Harvard Medical School developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.
